topic: Latest June 2026 APEX 26.1, ORDS 26.1, APEXlang, Oracle vector search with Gemini, and schema bridge ideas for an APEX coffee demo

key_findings.latest_apex_release: APEX 26.1 public release re-issued 2026-05-25; 26.1.1 patch bundle updated 2026-06-15
key_findings.latest_sqlcl_release: SQLcl 26.1.2 includes APEXlang lifecycle command support
key_findings.apexlang_layout: Official APEXlang source uses shared_components and supporting_objects directories
key_findings.gemini_embedding_candidate: Google docs list gemini-embedding-2 with 3072-dimensional output; repo still defaults to gemini-embedding-2-preview
key_findings.repo_gap: Optional APEX/ORDS runtime exists, but ORDS is image latest, src/apex is absent, and Litestar MCP is a dependency but not wired
